content_fingerprint: hugging face publishes guide to building pii safe web apps with openai s privacy filter a new community authored guide on hugging face walks developers through integrating openai s privacy filter into scalable web applications using the gradio framework to handle pii redaction at inference time hugging face has published a community guide covering how to embed openai s privacy filter directly into web application workflows the tutorial authored by yuvraj sharma freddy boulton and abubakar abid focuses on building applications that automatically detect and redact personally identifiable informa
